title: Retail Manager - Fashion/Town/S$5000
description:
A leading lifestyle retail brand is seeking an experienced Retail Manager to oversee multiple stores, drive sales performance, and uphold brand standards. The role requires strong leadership, operational excellence, and the ability to develop high-performing teams.


Responsibilities:

  • Lead Store Managers to achieve sales targets and retail KPIs.
  • Review store performance, identify opportunities, and implement improvement plans.
  • Conduct regular store visits and ensure operational and service standards are met.
  • Develop and coach store teams, supporting succession planning and staff development.
  • Maintain strong store presentation and visual merchandising consistency.
  • Coordinate with HR, merchandising, and logistics on manpower and operational needs.
  • Manage administrative matters and support ad-hoc business initiatives.


Requirements:

  • Proven multi-store retail management experience, ideally in lifestyle or fashion retail.
  • Strong leadership, communication, and coaching skills.
  • Analytical, organised, and able to manage fast-paced retail operations.


Interested applicant, kindly submit full-detailed resume to admin@clarist.com.sg

We thank all applicants for writing in. Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
CLARIST RESOURCES PTE. LTD.

Welcome to Clarist Resources, your premier Boutique Recruitment Agency specializing in Executive and Professional search. Our unwavering focus lies within the vibrant realms of the Fast Fashion, Beauty, and Luxury Goods & Service industry. This is not merely one of many areas we dabble in, but our sole and passionate dedication.


We understand that finding the right executive and professional talent in the fast-paced world of beauty, fashion and luxury can be challenging. We have honed our expertise to excel in this niche, enabling us to provide unparalleled services to our valued clients. We pride ourselves on being industry specialists with a deep understanding of the unique intricacies and demands of Fast Fashion, Beauty, and Luxury Goods.


At Clarist Resources, we do not believe in a one-size-fits-all approach. Each client is unique, and so are their requirements. Our personalized and tailored search methodologies ensure that we match the right talent with the right opportunities, fostering successful and long-lasting partnerships.


What sets us apart is not just our passion, but our extensive network of industry connections and our ability to tap into talent pools that others may overlook. We stay ahead of the curve, keeping a keen eye on market trends, emerging talents, and evolving needs within the industry.


Our commitment to excellence extends beyond just meeting expectations; we aim to exceed them. We believe in professionalism, confidentiality, and ethical conduct as the cornerstones of our operations. Our team of seasoned experts works tirelessly to deliver outstanding results for both our clients and candidates.


When you partner with Clarist Resources, you gain access to a team that genuinely cares about your success. Whether you are seeking a high-caliber executive to lead your organization or an exceptional professional to join your team, we have the know-how and drive to make it happen.


Experience the difference that true dedication to the Fast Fashion, Beauty, and Luxury Goods industry can make. Clarist Resources is your trusted ally in finding top-tier talent, and we are confident that we can do it better than anyone else.


Services Available

  • Executive Search
  • Headhunting
  • Permanent Placement
  • Contracting/Temporary Staff
  • Business Consulting 
  • Interview Preparation and Career Coaching
